[SQL: SELECT c.ownerid AS ownerid, COUNT(*) AS case_count, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate))) AS avg_handle_seconds
FROM "Case" c

  FROM casehistory__c

WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND c.closeddate >= '2023-05-02'
  AND c.closeddate <= '2023-09-02'
GROUP BY c.ownerid
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;]

args.query:
SELECT c.ownerid AS ownerid, COUNT(*) AS case_count, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate))) AS avg_handle_seconds
FROM "Case" c
JOIN (
  SELECT caseid__c
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
  GROUP BY caseid__c
  HAVING COUNT(*) = 1
) single_owner ON single_owner.caseid__c = c.id
WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND c.closeddate >= '2023-05-02'
  AND c.closeddate <= '2023-09-02'
GROUP BY c.ownerid
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query: SELECT id, caseid__c, oldvalue__c, newvalue__c, createddate, field__c FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment' LIMIT 20;

exec_args.sql: SELECT id, caseid__c, oldvalue__c, newvalue__c, createddate, field__c FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment' LIMIT 20;

args.query:
SELECT REPLACE(TRIM(caseid__c),'#','') AS case_id_norm, COUNT(*) AS owner_assign_count
FROM casehistory__c
WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
GROUP BY REPLACE(TRIM(caseid__c),'#','')
ORDER BY owner_assign_count DESC
LIMIT 20;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT REPLACE(TRIM(caseid__c),'#','') AS case_id_norm, COUNT(*) AS owner_assign_count
FROM casehistory__c
WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
GROUP BY REPLACE(TRIM(caseid__c),'#','')
ORDER BY owner_assign_count DESC
LIMIT 20;

args.query: SELECT id, ownerid, createddate, closeddate FROM "Case" WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL AND closeddate >= '2023-05-02' AND closeddate <= '2023-09-02' LIMIT 50;

exec_args.sql: SELECT id, ownerid, createddate, closeddate FROM "Case" WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL AND closeddate >= '2023-05-02' AND closeddate <= '2023-09-02' LIMIT 50;

args.query:
SELECT REPLACE(TRIM(c.ownerid),'#','') AS owner_norm, COUNT(*) AS case_count,
AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate::timestamp - c.createddate::timestamp))) AS avg_handle_seconds
FROM "Case" c
JOIN (
  SELECT REPLACE(TRIM(caseid__c),'#','') AS caseid_norm
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
  GROUP BY REPLACE(TRIM(caseid__c),'#','')
  HAVING COUNT(*) = 1
) single_owner ON REPLACE(TRIM(c.id),'#','') = single_owner.caseid_norm
WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND c.closeddate::timestamp >= '2023-05-02'::timestamp
  AND c.closeddate::timestamp <= '2023-09-02'::timestamp
GROUP BY owner_norm
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT REPLACE(TRIM(c.ownerid),'#','') AS owner_norm, COUNT(*) AS case_count,
AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate::timestamp - c.createddate::timestamp))) AS avg_handle_seconds
FROM "Case" c
JOIN (
  SELECT REPLACE(TRIM(caseid__c),'#','') AS caseid_norm
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
  GROUP BY REPLACE(TRIM(caseid__c),'#','')
  HAVING COUNT(*) = 1
) single_owner ON REPLACE(TRIM(c.id),'#','') = single_owner.caseid_norm
WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND c.closeddate::timestamp >= '2023-05-02'::timestamp
  AND c.closeddate::timestamp <= '2023-09-02'::timestamp
GROUP BY owner_norm
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
SELECT REPLACE(TRIM(ch.newvalue__c),'#','') AS agent_norm, COUNT(DISTINCT REPLACE(TRIM(ch.caseid__c),'#','')) AS processed_case_count
FROM casehistory__c ch
JOIN "Case" c ON REPLACE(TRIM(ch.caseid__c),'#','') = REPLACE(TRIM(c.id),'#','')
WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
  AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND c.closeddate::timestamp >= '2023-05-02'::timestamp
  AND c.closeddate::timestamp <= '2023-09-02'::timestamp
GROUP BY agent_norm
ORDER BY processed_case_count DESC
LIMIT 100;

FROM casehistory__c ch
JOIN "Case" c ON REPLACE(TRIM(ch.caseid__c),'#','') = REPLACE(TRIM(c.id),'#','')
WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'

  AND c.closeddate::timestamp <= '2023-09-02'::timestamp
GROUP BY agent_norm
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT REPLACE(TRIM(ch.caseid__c),'#','')) > 1
ORDER BY processed_case_count DESC;
